info.title: SaaSFlow Public API
info.description: Public REST API for SaaSFlow. All routes require Authorization: Bearer <token>, where <token> is either a Firebase Auth JWT or a SaaSFlow API key (sf_…).

200.description: List of companies the user has access to

name.description: The name of the company.

baseCurrency.description: The base currency for the company.

lastOverallUpdatedTime.description: When any data within the company was last updated.

plShowPlanningPercentageForPastMonths.description: Whether to show planning percentages for past months in P&L.

plShowAllCategories.description: Whether to show all categories in P&L, including empty ones.

items.description: A granular permission in the form `<resource>:<action>`. Stored on companiesUsers and companiesApiKeys. When a grant has `permissions: null` it means unrestricted (legacy behavior derived from role).

integrationTypes.description: Distinct integration types currently active for this company. Used by the UI to gate features that depend on a specific integration being installed (e.g. show DATEV personnel-number input only when a datevLohnjournal integration exists). Avoids loading the full /integrations list — that endpoint is owner-only.

200.description: List of users in the company

role.description: The role assigned to a user within the system. Owner = full access incl. company settings, billing, and user management; editor = read/write on data; viewer = read-only. The role is also used as the default permission preset and as a non-permission marker (e.g. notifications are sent to all owners). For granular API access control, see PermissionSchema.
